description_long: This is a portable Tecsun S-8800 radio receiver with a rectangular black plastic body and a large silver speaker grille on the left side of the front face. The front panel features a digital display screen with an orange backlight, several rotary dials for tuning and volume, and multiple push buttons for various functions. A prominent black carrying handle is attached to the top, making it easy to transport. The back side displays technical information labels, ventilation holes, and input/output ports, including a headphone jack and auxiliary connections. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. The device's controls and display are clearly visible and accessible from the front, while the rear is more utilitarian with ports and labels.
description: A black Tecsun S-8800 portable radio receiver with a silver speaker grille, digital display, multiple dials, and a top carrying handle. The front is equipped with controls and a screen, while the back has ports and technical labels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the silver speaker grille, digital display, control dials, buttons, and the Tecsun logo.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the carrying handle, input/output ports, and technical labels.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full technical label, ventilation holes, and the Tecsun branding.
description_view_3: Angled front-side view emphasizing the handle, speaker grille, and the arrangement of dials and buttons.
